q: This command displays the current ZTP configuration of the switch. It also displays detailed information about current state of a ZTP session. It displays information related to all configuration sections as defined in the switch provisioning information discovered in a particular ZTP session.
Use this command to enable ZTP administrative mode
This command is used to add or delete the vlan.
This command is used to add or delete multiple vlans via single command.
This command is used to clear switch counters.
This command displays the global sFlow configuration that includes the admin state, collectors, the Agent ID and counter polling interval.
This command displays PBH table configuration.
This command displays PBH rule configuration.
This command is used to manage switch MMU configuration.

Question: display the current CPU usage on the router
display the current memory usage on the router
clear the dynamic NAT and NAPT translation entries
clear the statistics of all the NAT and NAPT entries
set the interface naming mode as default
set the interface naming mode as alias
shut down all the BGP IPv4 & IPv6 sessions
